name: Lois' Upside Down Applepie W/Pecans
recipeIngredient: 2 Pie crusts; may be frozen as needed
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the apples and spices for your favorite 9-inch pie.
2. Prepare or buy 2 pie crusts.
3. Butter a pie pan completely and well, ensuring all sides are coated with 1/2 cup of butter.
4. Place pecans in the bottom of the pie pan and sprinkle with brown sugar.
5. Cover the pecans and sugar with your bottom pie crust.
6. Proceed with your apple pie filling as usual, but aim for a firm and flat result rather than bulging.
7. Seal and flute both crusts.
8. Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for exactly 50 minutes.
9. Cool for 5 minutes on a rack, then turn the pie out onto a serving dish immediately.
10. Flip the pie over so that the pecans are on top and the usual top of the pie is on the bottom after 5 minutes.
This recipe is from Lois. She recommends flipping it out after 5 minutes to prevent the butter and sugar from hardening, ensuring an enjoyable experience for everyone.
